summary: Today's Games Scheduled Start Times - UTC +00:00 London
description:
GIVEN games are scheduled for today
AND the PlayStation time zone is set to UTC +00:00 London

steps.action: WHEN the user is on the Games page for today
steps.result: THEN the game tiles show the scheduled start times in the UTC +00:00 London time zone (format: hh:mm [AM|PM])
